mission.title: helm: helm upgrade fails with spec.clusterIP: Invalid value: "": field is immutable
mission.description: helm upgrade fails with spec.clusterIP: Invalid value: "": field is immutable. Users encounter: "UPGRADE FAILED: Service "my-service" is invalid: spec.clusterIP: Invalid value: "": field is immutab".

steps.title: Identify helm troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your helm deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n helm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=helm
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=helm -n helm --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `UPGRADE FAILED: Service "my-service" is invalid: spec.clusterIP: Invalid value: "": field is immutable`

steps.title: Review helm configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant helm configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n helm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=helm
kubectl get configmap -n helm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=helm
```
When issue helm upgrade, it shows errors like, ("my-service" change from "clusterIP: None" to "type: LoadBalancer" without field clusterIP)

```
Error: UPGRADE FAILED: Service "my-service" is invalid: spec.clusterIP: Invalid value: "": field is

steps.title: Apply the fix for helm upgrade fails with spec.clusterIP: Invalid value: "":
steps.description:
gebruik nu helm deploys om onze eigenlijke applicatie te exposen, hopelijk werkt het
```yaml
Error: UPGRADE FAILED: Service "my-service" is invalid: spec.clusterIP: Invalid value: "": field is immutable
```

steps.title: Confirm helm upgrade fails with spec.clusterIP: Invalid is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=helm -n helm --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n helm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `UPGRADE FAILED: Service "my-service" is invalid: spec.clusterIP: Invalid value: "": field is immutable` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary: gebruik nu helm deploys om onze eigenlijke applicatie te exposen, hopelijk werkt het
